$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the presentations index. To add a deck: drop decks/<slug>/index.html, then prepend an entry here. Order = display order (newest first). No code edits needed.

decks.title: WeAssist — The 2036 Vision
decks.summary: Full-company EOS vision: 1,750 clients & 5,000 OPs at a 4.0 ratio, the honest churn truth, and the AI/automation engine — across every department — that gets us there.

decks.title: AI & Dev — May Recap & Strategic Shift
decks.summary: May recap of AI/dev progress and the strategic shift toward cost optimization across the stack.
